strategy: Always keep a Shield on yourself before you damage Kurokage. Hitting him unshielded triggers a Vampire drain back on you.
He strips all Wards from a random wizard every other round, so do not over-invest in shields; refresh the one you attack behind.
He resists Myth 70% and takes +40% from Storm, so hit with Storm.
Only 1,935 health across the boss; blade once and AoE to clear him and the treant, monk, and wildclaw minions together.
cheatNotes: Damaging Kurokage while you have no Shield up makes him interrupt-cast Vampire on you, draining you.
Every other round he casts a Myth spell that removes all Wards from a random wizard.
